tours.title: 3 Days / 2 Nights Maasai Mara Road Safari
tours.excerpt: A compact road safari from Nairobi with two nights in the Maasai Mara and a source itinerary built around game drives.
tours.overview: Take the road from Nairobi to the Maasai Mara for two nights in the reserve. The source itinerary pairs afternoon, morning and evening game drives with a final morning drive before the return to Nairobi. Your quote will confirm the vehicle, accommodation, residency basis, travel dates and current KSh rate.

source.reference: Current Ashford product page and workspace crawl
source.snapshot: The current source lists a three-day road itinerary from Nairobi, two nights at Mara Sopa Lodge or Sentrim Mara Camp, game drives, meals, park fees, safari van or Land Cruiser transport, and USD seasonal rates. USD rates and source policies were retained for audit only and were not converted into public KSh sales data.
source.notes: MVP draft awaiting operator review of dates, residency, vehicle, accommodation, inclusions, KSh rate, policies and media rights.

fields.hks_accommodation_basis: Source options: Mara Sopa Lodge or Sentrim Mara Camp. The final property, room basis and availability must be confirmed in the quote.
fields.hks_meals_summary: Source itinerary: lunch and dinner on Day 1; breakfast, lunch and dinner on Day 2; breakfast on Day 3.

hks_itinerary.description: Drive from Nairobi through the Great Rift Valley to the Maasai Mara. The source itinerary schedules lunch after arrival and an afternoon game drive.
hks_itinerary.accommodation: Mara Sopa Lodge or Sentrim Mara Camp, subject to quote

hks_itinerary.day_title: Game drives in the Maasai Mara
hks_itinerary.description: Spend the day in the reserve with morning and evening game drives in the source itinerary. An optional Maasai village visit is mentioned by the source and is not included unless confirmed in the quote.
hks_itinerary.activities:
Morning game drive
Evening game drive
hks_itinerary.accommodation: Mara Sopa Lodge or Sentrim Mara Camp, subject to quote

hks_itinerary.description: The source itinerary includes a morning game drive and breakfast before the road journey back to Nairobi.

hks_inclusions.detail: Safari van or Land Cruiser from Nairobi and back; final vehicle confirmed in the quote.
Listed by the source; residency basis and current fee treatment require review.
Source lodge/camp options; final property and room basis confirmed in the quote.
Two breakfasts, two lunches and two dinners are listed.

hks_inclusions.item: Bottled drinking water in the safari vehicle

hks_exclusions.item: Nairobi accommodation before or after the safari
hks_exclusions.detail: Not included unless added to the quote.

hks_exclusions.item: Drinks not stated in the meal plan
hks_exclusions.detail: Soft drinks and alcoholic drinks are listed as excluded by the source.
Laundry, calls and similar personal costs are excluded.
A Maasai village visit or other add-ons are quoted separately when requested.

fields.hks_best_for: Travelers starting in Nairobi who want a two-night road safari and enough time for several game drives without taking a full week away.

tours.title: Nairobi National Park Tour — 4 Hours
tours.excerpt: A short morning or afternoon Nairobi National Park outing for people who want wildlife time without leaving the city for a full day.
tours.overview: Set aside four hours for a Nairobi National Park visit close to the city. The source lists morning and afternoon departures; your quote will confirm pickup, vehicle, park-fee basis, availability and the current KSh rate for your group.

source.reference: Current Ashford excursion listing and workspace crawl
source.snapshot: The current source identifies a four-hour Nairobi National Park tour with morning and afternoon departures and an old USD per-person price. The USD amount was not converted or mapped to an approved KSh rate. Pickup, vehicle, inclusions and residency assumptions require operator review.
source.notes: MVP draft awaiting operator review of pickup area, departure windows, vehicle, group basis, park fees, KSh rate, inclusions and media rights.

hks_itinerary.description: The source describes a four-hour park tour with morning and afternoon departure options. Exact pickup, timing and return point are confirmed in the quote.

fields.hks_best_for: Nairobi residents, families and hosts with visiting friends or relatives who want a short wildlife outing close to the city.

tours.title: 3 Days / 2 Nights Amboseli Safari
tours.excerpt: A three-day road safari from Nairobi with two nights in Amboseli and game drives in the landscape below Mount Kilimanjaro.
tours.overview: Travel from Nairobi to Amboseli for two nights and a source itinerary built around afternoon, morning and evening game drives. Clear Mount Kilimanjaro views depend on weather. Your quote will confirm the vehicle, lodge, residency basis, dates and current KSh rate.

fields.hks_hero_headline: Trade one Nairobi weekend for two nights in the Mara.
fields.hks_supporting_copy: The road, lodge and game-drive rhythm are already mapped. Tell us your month, group size and comfort preference; we’ll confirm the current KSh quote and what is included before you decide.

fields.hks_hero_headline: A Nairobi safari that fits into half a day.
fields.hks_supporting_copy: Choose a morning or afternoon window, then share your group size and pickup area. We’ll confirm the current park-fee basis, vehicle and KSh quote in WhatsApp before you commit.

fields.hks_hero_headline: Make Amboseli your next three-day reset.
fields.hks_supporting_copy: The source itinerary covers two nights and several game drives at the foot of Mount Kilimanjaro; clear mountain views depend on weather. Tell us your dates, group and lodge preference for a current KSh quote.
